_comment: Talisman generation tables for procedural equippable talismans (trinket slot accessories)

perks.name: Bleed Resistance
perks.description: 50% chance to resist Bleeding

perks.name: Bleed Immunity
perks.description: Immune to Bleeding status

perks.name: Poison Resistance
perks.description: 50% chance to resist Poisoned

perks.name: Poison Immunity
perks.description: Immune to Poisoned status

perks.name: Fear Resistance
perks.description: 50% chance to resist Feared

perks.name: Fear Immunity
perks.description: Immune to Feared status

perks.name: Charm Resistance
perks.description: 50% chance to resist Charmed

perks.name: Charm Immunity
perks.description: Immune to Charmed status

perks.name: Stun Resistance
perks.description: 50% chance to resist Stun

perks.name: Stun Immunity
perks.description: Immune to Stun

perks.name: Mind Fortress
perks.description: Immune to all mental effects (Fear, Charm, Confusion, Berserk)

perks.name: Minor Regeneration
perks.description: Regenerate 2% of max HP per turn, rounded up

perks.name: Moderate Regeneration
perks.description: Regenerate 4% of max HP per turn, rounded up

perks.name: Greater Regeneration
perks.description: Regenerate 7% of max HP per turn, rounded up

perks.name: Mana Trickle
perks.description: Regenerate 2% of max mana per turn, rounded up

perks.name: Mana Stream
perks.description: Regenerate 4% of max mana per turn, rounded up

perks.name: Mana Cascade
perks.description: Regenerate 7% of max mana per turn, rounded up

perks.name: Thorns
perks.description: Reflect 3 damage to melee attackers

perks.name: Lucky Escape
perks.description: +15% dodge when below 25% HP

perks.name: Karma Sight
perks.description: Reveals karma changes in events

perks.name: Hungry Ghost Binding
perks.description: 15% chance that enemies slain by this character rise as allied undead for the remainder of combat

perks.name: Magic Mirror
perks.description: 10% chance to reflect hostile incoming spells back at the caster

perks.name: Blur
perks.description: +10% dodge chance

perks.name: Lifesteal
perks.description: Heal for 15% of damage dealt by attacks

perks.name: Minor Ember Brand
perks.description: Attacks deal +5% base damage as bonus fire damage, rounded up

perks.name: Ember Brand
perks.description: Attacks deal +10% base damage as bonus fire damage, rounded up

perks.name: Greater Ember Brand
perks.description: Attacks deal +15% base damage as bonus fire damage, rounded up

perks.name: Minor Frost Brand
perks.description: Attacks deal +5% base damage as bonus water damage, rounded up

perks.name: Frost Brand
perks.description: Attacks deal +10% base damage as bonus water damage, rounded up

perks.name: Greater Frost Brand
perks.description: Attacks deal +15% base damage as bonus water damage, rounded up

perks.name: Minor Stone Brand
perks.description: Attacks deal +5% base damage as bonus earth damage, rounded up

perks.name: Stone Brand
perks.description: Attacks deal +10% base damage as bonus earth damage, rounded up

perks.name: Greater Stone Brand
perks.description: Attacks deal +15% base damage as bonus earth damage, rounded up

perks.name: Minor Storm Brand
perks.description: Attacks deal +5% base damage as bonus air damage, rounded up

perks.name: Storm Brand
perks.description: Attacks deal +10% base damage as bonus air damage, rounded up

perks.name: Greater Storm Brand
perks.description: Attacks deal +15% base damage as bonus air damage, rounded up

perks.name: Minor Void Brand
perks.description: Attacks deal +5% base damage as bonus space damage, rounded up

perks.name: Void Brand
perks.description: Attacks deal +10% base damage as bonus space damage, rounded up

perks.name: Greater Void Brand
perks.description: Attacks deal +15% base damage as bonus space damage, rounded up

perks.name: Minor Iron Brand
perks.description: Attacks deal +5% base damage as bonus physical damage, rounded up

perks.name: Iron Brand
perks.description: Attacks deal +10% base damage as bonus physical damage, rounded up

perks.name: Greater Iron Brand
perks.description: Attacks deal +15% base damage as bonus physical damage, rounded up

perks.name: Minor Venom Brand
perks.description: Attacks deal +5% base damage as poison and 5% chance to inflict Poisoned, rounded up

perks.name: Venom Brand
perks.description: Attacks deal +10% base damage as poison and 10% chance to inflict Poisoned, rounded up

perks.name: Greater Venom Brand
perks.description: Attacks deal +15% base damage as poison and 15% chance to inflict Poisoned, rounded up
